channel.title: itch.io Charity Bundles — Opportunities
channel.description: Auto-collected posts and jams related to charity/fundraisers on itch.io (fresh-only).

item.title: [JAMS] itch.io
item.description: Gwueble Jam - 2026 Hosted by Queble , Gwizz1027 Â· #gwueblejam 117 Joined Overview Community Submissions open from 2026-07-19 19:00:00 to 2026-07-27 00:00:00 Starts in years months days hours minutes seconds Join jam Overview Welcome to the Gwueble Jam - a week long game jam host
